name: Wheel bolt (lug)
notes: All MY2012+ 981; tighten diagonally, dry/no anti-seize. The legacy 130 Nm figure is the pre-2011 987.1 value and does NOT apply to the 981.

name: Engine oil drain plug
notes: T50 Torx; fit a new aluminium crush ring each time. Aftermarket magnetic plugs may spec lower (~25 Nm).

name: Brake caliper mounting bolt (front)
notes: Single-use stretch bolts — replace on every removal. Front and rear identical.

name: Brake caliper mounting bolt (rear)
notes: Single-use stretch bolts — replace on every removal. Same as front.

name: Spark plug
notes: Sources cluster 25-30 Nm; 30 Nm is the target. No anti-seize on the threads.

name: PDK gear-oil drain plug
notes: 8mm hex.

name: PDK gear-oil fill plug
notes: 8mm hex.

name: PDK clutch-oil pan drain plug
notes: Some Porsche docs cite 15-18 Nm.

name: Manual transmission drain & fill plug
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: source is a closely-related 987.2 6-speed, not 981-verified. Confirm against the workshop manual.

name: Coolant drain plug
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: value is from a 997 document, not 981-verified.

name: Brake disc retaining (countersunk) screw
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: M6 value from an older-model chart; no 981-specific source found. Plausible.

name: Engine mount bolts
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: M10 value from an older-model chart, NOT 981-verified.

name: Control arm fastener
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: from an older-model chart only. The 981 likely uses angle-torque (Nm + degrees). Not verified — use the workshop manual.

name: Engine oil approval
notes: HTHS >= 3.5, high TBN. Later A40 oils may also carry the C40 spec.

name: Engine oil viscosity
notes: Factory fill is Mobil 1 0W-40. 5W-40 and 5W-50 are also A40-approved alternatives.

name: Coolant type
notes: Equivalent to VW G12++ / TL774-J; the 'pink/002' family. Zerex G40 is an OEM-equivalent. Porsche concentrate P/N 00004330149.

name: Coolant mixing ratio
notes: A prediluted version also exists. Small top-ups with distilled water are acceptable.

name: Brake fluid
notes: Dry boiling point min 265C, wet 175C. Change every 2 years. Porsche P/N 00004321082.

name: PDK gear oil
notes: Separate circuit from the PDK clutch/control fluid. Retailers often mislabel the clutch fluid as 'PDK transmission fluid' — the gears use 75W-90.

name: PDK clutch / control fluid
notes: Porsche P/N 00004330513 (supersedes 00004320729 / 00004330512). This is the fluid often mislabeled as 'PDK transmission fluid'.

name: Manual transmission gear oil
notes: Factory fill is Shell Spirax S5 ATE 75W-90. Porsche P/N 00004330549.

name: Power steering fluid
notes: The 981 uses electric power steering — no pump, no fluid, nothing to service.

name: A/C refrigerant type
notes: No R1234yf cutover found for the 981; the transition lands on the later 982/718. Verify against the engine-bay refrigerant label.

name: Engine oil capacity (2.7L)
notes: With filter change. ~7.25 L without filter; ~10.1 L dry.

name: Engine oil capacity (3.4L)
notes: With filter change. Same as the 2.7L per all sources.

name: Engine oil capacity (3.8L)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: listed under the shared family figure, not independently confirmed for the GT4/Spyder 3.8L.

name: Coolant total system capacity (2.7/3.4)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: total system (not drain-and-fill), from an aggregator. Verify against the manual.

name: Coolant total system capacity (3.8)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: aggregator figure, larger cooling demand assumed for GT4/Spyder.

name: PDK gear oil capacity (drain & fill)
notes: Service volume, not total.

name: PDK clutch fluid exchanged (service)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: service pack is ~6 L but only ~2-2.5 L is exchanged. Requires PIWIS fill mode at a set fluid temperature.

name: Manual gearbox oil capacity (refill)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: forum consensus; confirm against the manual.

name: Fuel tank capacity (standard)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: aggregator figure for the standard tank.

name: Fuel tank capacity (optional extended range)
notes: No-cost option; very common, so many spec sites list 64 L as default.

name: Tyre size (18 inch, base/S)
notes: Rims 8Jx18 ET57 front / 9Jx18 ET47 rear. Base normally on 18 inch.

name: Tyre size (19 inch, base/S/GTS)
notes: Rims 8Jx19 ET57 front / 9.5Jx19 ET45 rear. S normally on 19 inch.

name: Tyre size (20 inch, GTS/Spyder)
notes: Rims 8Jx20 ET57 front / 9.5Jx20 ET45 rear. GTS standard on 20 inch; Spyder same sizes.

name: Tyre size (GT4)
notes: Wider than base/S/GTS. OEM Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 N1. Rims 8.5Jx20 front / 10Jx20 rear.

name: Cold tyre pressure (18 inch)
value: F 2.0 bar (29 psi) / R 2.1 bar (30 psi)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: database baseline; the normal-vs-full-load split could not be separated. Always read the door-jamb/fuel-flap placard.

name: Cold tyre pressure (19 inch)
value: F 2.0 bar (29 psi) / R 2.1 bar (30 psi)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: same as 18 inch in databases; read the placard for definitive normal/full-load figures.

name: Cold tyre pressure (20 inch)
value: F 2.2 bar (32 psi) / R 2.3 bar (33 psi)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: comfort ~2.1 bar vs normal/full ~2.3 bar split suggested; axle full-load values unconfirmed. Read the placard.

name: Cold tyre pressure (GT4, street)
value: F 2.0 bar (29 psi) / R 2.3 bar (33 psi)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: door-placard street reading. One database showed 36 psi (likely track/loaded).

name: Battery type
notes: OEM Banner, Porsche P/N 99961107012. AGM required (start-stop). Replacement must be coded in with PIWIS.

name: Battery location
value: Front trunk (frunk), under a black cover

name: Alternator output
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: from a parts listing; some base units listed at 120 A. Verify by part number.

name: Key fob battery
notes: Porsche P/N 99961110800.

name: Brake pad minimum thickness
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: recommended replacement around 2.5 mm. From a forum, not a factory table.

name: Front disc minimum thickness (S/GTS)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: minimum is stamped on the disc hub; cross-verified across two threads.

name: Rear disc minimum thickness (S/GTS)
notes: MEDIUM-CONFIDENCE: one poster mis-stated 22 mm; the corrected value is 18 mm.

name: Front disc minimum thickness (base)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: base front diameter 315 mm; thickness believed same as S. Verify the value stamped on the disc.

name: Rear disc minimum thickness (base)
notes: LOW-CONFIDENCE: same thickness as S assumed; verify the stamped value on the disc.

name: Engine oil service interval
notes: Some early booklets cite 2 yr / 20k mi; 1yr/10k is the conservative widely-used figure. Many owners shorten to 5,000-7,500 mi.
